items.summary: In a letter to the residents of Tumbler Ridge, Canada, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman said he is “deeply sorry” that his company failed to alert law enforcement about the suspect in a recent mass shooting.

items.summary: Nuclear startup X-energy went public, geothermal startup Fervo is about to. Could this be the moment that climate tech investors have been waiting for?

items.title: Why Cohere is merging with Aleph Alpha
items.title_zh: Cohere为何与Aleph Alpha合并
items.summary: Canadian AI startup Cohere is taking over Germany-based Aleph Alpha with support from Lidl’s owner, Schwarz Group. With the blessing of their governments, the companies intend to offer a sovereign alternative to enterprises in an AI landscape dominated by American players.

items.title: Why Tokyo is the most important tech destination of 2026

items.summary: SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 has four tightly defined technology domains, each backed by live demonstrations, dedicated exhibit floors, and sessions featuring the people actually building and funding these technologies globally.

items.title: Trump fires the entire National Science Board
items.title_zh: 特朗普解雇了整个国家科学委员会
items.summary: Multiple sources are reporting that the Trump administration has dismissed the entire National Science Board (NSB). The NSB advises the president and Congress on the National Science Foundation (NSF), which has already been funding research at historically low levels and has seen significant delays in doling out that funding. The NSF has been fundamental in […]

items.title: An influx of used EVs could drive down prices
items.title_zh: 二手电动汽车的涌入可能会降低价格
items.summary: Part of what has held back electric cars has been the cost. But an influx of used vehicles over the next three years could bring prices down dramatically. In 2025, just 123,000 leases on EVs expired. That is expected to more than double to 300,000 in 2026, and double again to 600,000 in 2027 and […]

items.title: Researchers say we’re talking less than ever
items.title_zh: 研究人员说，我们比以往任何时候都少说话
items.summary: Researchers at the University of Missouri-Kansas City and the University of Arizona say that between 2005 and 2019, the number of words we speak out loud to another human being fell by nearly 28 percent. And that has likely only gotten worse following the pandemic. The researchers actually counted the number of words we were […]

One of my favorites so far is the Sharge Icemag 3, a 10,000mAh model that can wirelessly output 25W to […]

items.title: Xbox’s weirdest studio is on a roll

The game studio led by Tim Schafer is beloved for offbeat titles like Brütal Legend and Broken Age, but after being acquired by Microsoft in 2019, its only new release for years was a long-awaited sequel to Psychonauts. He's brought with him two feature films: Small, Slow But Steady and Two Seasons, Two Strangers, a pair of naturalistic portraits that deal with the uneasy human desire to relate to other people. Seclusion and unease are bedrocks to Miyake's growing filmography. "I like these […]

Together with Google, they've shaped our sense of what a smartphone is and what it can do, pushing the boundaries of mobile photography, software, and processing power. But over the last few years, they've sat back, content to iterate rather than […]

items.title: Mexico says US agents killed in crash weren't permitted to operate there

items.summary: The two Americans who reportedly worked for the CIA died in a car crash after a Mexican-led operation to destroy a drug lab.

items.summary: Local elections have been held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.

items.title: Rights groups critical as Venezuela prisoner release scheme 'coming to an end'
items.title_zh: 作为委内瑞拉囚犯释放计划“即将结束”的人权组织至关重要
items.summary: More than 500 political prisoners are thought to still be in jail, despite the releases since the amnesty law was brought in.

items.summary: Many died due to conditions at a warehouse they'd been shipped to, while others arrived dead, authorities say.

items.summary: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.

items.summary: The flood warning system at Imja glacial lake has not been maintained since 2016, fearful locals tell BBC.

items.summary: Há pouco menos de um ano, João Gomes, Mestrinho e Jota.Pê fizeram o primeiro show do projeto "Dominguinho", na Casa Natura, em São Paulo. Havia menos de mil pessoas no espaço, mas era surpreendente ver como a maioria já sabia cantar de cor as músicas do álbum, então recém-lançado. Leia mais (04/26/2026 - 00h01)

items.title: Geração Z prioriza crescimento no trabalho, enquanto boomers focam equilíbrio, diz levantamento
items.title_zh: 调查显示， Z世代优先考虑工作中的增长，而婴儿潮一代则专注于平衡
items.summary: Enquanto 86% dos profissionais da Geração Z (nascidos entre 1997 e 2012) apontam crescimento e promoção como foco principal, o equilíbrio entre vida pessoal e profissional é o aspecto mais valorizado entre os baby boomers (nascidos entre 1946 e 1964), com 66%, segundo levantamento da Robert Half, uma consultoria global de soluções em talentos. Leia mais (04/26/2026 - 00h01)

items.title: Projetos de trens e metrôs precisam de governança metropolitana, afirma executiva de associação

items.summary: O transporte de passageiros sobre trilhos precisa ter uma governança metropolitana para que os projetos sejam implantados e se desenvolvam, sem dependerem do interesse de um ou outro governante. Leia mais (04/25/2026 - 23h58)

items.title: Saudades das placas de carro com três letras e quatro números
items.title_zh: 缺少带有三个字母和四个数字的车牌
items.summary: GBS-1844. Era a placa do meu primeiro carro. Letras de um lado, números do outro. Em cima, a cidade e a sigla do Estado. Tinha uma lógica. Uma geografia embutida, o carro já vinha com sotaque. Leia mais (04/25/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Veja quem votou na lista da Folha dos melhores livros brasileiros de não ficção do século
items.title_zh: 看看谁为Folha的本世纪最佳巴西非小说类书籍榜单投票
items.summary: O corpo de cem jurados da lista organizada pela Folha para escolher os melhores livros brasileiros de não ficção do século 21 reúne uma gama de diferentes perfis e especialidades. Leia mais (04/25/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Zema fez as pazes com a Inconfidência Mineira, mas já a viu com outros olhos
items.title_zh: Zema与Inconfidência Mineira和解，但已经用不同的眼光看到了她
items.summary: O ex-governador de Minas Gerais Romeu Zema fez as pazes com a Inconfidência Mineira. Açoitando os "intocáveis" do Supremo Tribunal Federal, valeu-se do aniversário da execução de Tiradentes e disparou: "Brasília explora o Brasil como os portugueses fizeram. (...) A luta dos inconfidentes não acabou". Leia mais (04/25/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Os 'filhos de Tchernóbil' que foram acolhidos para tratamento no Brasil
items.title_zh: 在巴西接受治疗的“切尔诺贝利儿童”
items.summary: "Foi a experiência mais maravilhosa da minha vida, eu me emociono até hoje", relata Tânia Regina Welgacz ao lembrar de Dasha, a menina ucraniana de 9 anos, que veio ao Brasil pelo Programa Crianças de Tchernóbil no final dos anos 1990 e que ela abrigou em sua casa. Leia mais (04/25/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: O arquivo de Cyro Etchegoyen
items.title_zh: Cyro Etchegoyen的档案
items.summary: Três repórteres do ICL Notícias (Juliana Dal Piva, Chico Otavio e Igor Mello) desvendaram um dos mistérios dos "anos de chumbo": a conexão do aparelho repressivo da ditadura com os serviços de informação da Inglaterra. Conheciam-se algumas pistas, mas a trinca expôs o monstro nos seus detalhes, na série de reportagens "Bandidos de Farda". Leia mais (04/25/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: Casos de câncer de pâncreas crescem entre jovens, aponta estudo
items.title_zh: 胰腺癌病例在年轻人中生长，研究发现
items.summary: O perfil de pacientes com câncer de pâncreas está mudando. Embora a maioria dos diagnósticos ocorra após os 55 anos, um estudo conduzido por pesquisadores do Brasil e do Canadá revela que a incidência e a mortalidade pela doença em pessoas de até 49 anos devem aumentar nas próximas décadas. Leia mais (04/25/2026 - 23h00)

items.title: DeepSeek unveils new AI model tailored for Huawei chips
items.title_zh: DeepSeek推出专为华为芯片量身定制的新型AI模型
items.summary: The close collaboration with Huawei on the new model, the V4, contrasts with DeepSeek's past reliance on Nvidia's AI chips.

items.title: Trump evacuated from press dinner in Washington after shots reportedly fired
items.title_zh: 据报道，在枪击事件发生后，特朗普从华盛顿的新闻晚宴上撤离
items.summary: Trump administration officials appeared to have been evacuated first and uncertainty remained as to what exactly happened.

items.title: US-Iran peace hopes fade as Trump scraps talks
items.title_zh: 随着特朗普废除谈判，美伊和平希望逐渐消失
items.summary: Trump says that he scrapped the envoys' visit because the talks involved too much travel and expense to consider an inadequate offer from the Iranians.

items.title: Bali trash issues raise concerns after landfill closure
items.title_zh: 巴厘岛垃圾问题在垃圾填埋场关闭后引发担忧
items.summary: Residents are forced to burn and throw their garbage to rivers after the 32-hectare Suwung landfill limits garbage collection ahead of its Aug. 1 closure.

items.title: WHO approves first malaria treatment for infants
items.title_zh: 世卫组织批准首个针对婴儿的疟疾治疗
items.summary: Up to now, infants have been treated with formulations intended for older children, carrying a greater risk of dosage errors, side effects and toxicity.

items.title: Forecast for strong El Nino fans worries about global crops as Iran war bites
items.title_zh: 随着伊朗战争的爆发，强烈的厄尔尼诺现象粉丝对全球作物的担忧
items.summary: "The last time we saw similar signals was during the severe 2015 to 2016 El Nino," a meteorologist has said.

items.title: Palestinian local elections give some Gazans a chance to vote for the first time...
items.title_zh: 巴勒斯坦地方选举让一些加沙人首次有机会投票...
items.summary: Most electoral lists are aligned with President Mahmoud Abbas's secular-nationalist Fatah party or running as independents, with no lists affiliated with Fatah's archrival Hamas.

items.title: EU, US sign critical minerals plan to counter China reliance
items.title_zh: 欧盟，美国签署关键矿产计划，以应对中国的依赖
items.summary: An action plan said that the EU and US would explore setting minimum prices on critical minerals, effectively preventing China or other outside powers from flooding the market with inexpensive exports.

items.title: US-Kuwaiti journalist leaves Kuwait after release from detention
items.title_zh: 美籍科威特记者获释后离开科威特
items.summary: Shihab-Eldin had not been seen in public since March 2, after being detained by Kuwaiti authorities during a crackdown by Gulf nations on people filming or posting footage from the conflict that started when the US and Israel attacked Iran at the end of February.

items.title: Google to invest up to $40 billion in AI rival Anthropic
items.title_zh: 谷歌将向人工智能竞争对手Anthropic投资高达400 $
items.summary: The investment comes just days after e-commerce giant Amazon said itwill invest up to $25 billion in the artificial intelligence (AI) startup.

items.title: Watch: Donald Trump ducks for cover as security rushes to evacuate him
items.title_zh: 观看：唐纳德特朗普躲藏起来，因为安全人员急于疏散他
items.summary: Panic erupted at the White House Correspondents' Dinner as gunshots were heard, forcing President Trump and Vice President Vance to be swiftly evacuated. Secret Service agents secured the venue, apprehending a suspect. Despite the scare, Trump praised security and declared "the show must go on." The incident caused widespread confusion and a massive security response.

items.title: Engine fire on SWISS Delhi-Zurich flight during take off roll; aircraft evacuated on runway
items.title_zh: 起飞过程中瑞士德里-苏黎世航班引擎起火；飞机在跑道上撤离
items.summary: Six passengers were hospitalized after a SWISS flight from Delhi to Zurich was evacuated on the runway due to an engine fire during takeoff. The Airbus A330's engine number one failed at 104 knots, prompting the crew to abort the takeoff and evacuate all 232 passengers and crew using emergency slides.

items.title: Preity Zinta punches Arya, batter’s reaction goes viral – Watch
items.title_zh: Preity Zinta拳击Arya ，面糊的反应病毒式传播–观看
items.summary: Punjab Kings pulled off a record chase against Delhi Capitals, but a playful moment stole the show as Preity Zinta jokingly punched Priyansh Arya, whose reaction went viral. Ravi Shastri quipped, “Oh, that was a good punch.” Earlier, KL Rahul’s 152 powered DC to 264/2, but Punjab responded strongly, with Prabhsimran, Arya, and Shreyas Iyer leading a stunning chase to stay unbeaten.

items.title: ‘Taken offsite’: Who was the shooter at Trump’s White House dinner? First image emerges
items.title_zh: “被带离现场” ：特朗普白宫晚宴上的枪手是谁？第一张照片出现
items.summary: President Donald Trump was evacuated from the White House Correspondents' Dinner after shots were fired, with the suspect apprehended by the Secret Service. An individual reportedly attempted to enter with a gun but was stopped before reaching the ballroom. Trump praised law enforcement and urged the event to continue.

items.title: Blue Origin’s rockets whose photos Bezos shared & Musk congratulated 'failed' minutes later
items.title_zh: Blue Origin的火箭，贝索斯分享的照片和马斯克在几分钟后祝贺“失败”
items.summary: Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket achieved a successful booster landing but failed to deliver its satellite payload to the correct orbit. This marks the program's first major mission failure. The FAA has grounded the rocket pending an investigation into the upper stage engine issue, impacting future flights.

items.title: IPL: Will MS Dhoni play today against Gujarat Titans in Chepauk?
items.title_zh: IPL ： Dhoni女士今天会在Chepauk对阵Gujarat Titans吗？
items.summary: Chennai Super Kings, buoyed by a massive win, face Gujarat Titans with MS Dhoni's return still a mystery. Despite being match-fit, Dhoni is reportedly delaying his comeback to maintain CSK's winning combination. Head coach Stephen Fleming confirmed his progress, while the team looks to leverage home advantage at Chepauk.

items.title: 'Quite an evening': Trump wanted 'the show to go on' after shooting at White House Correspondents' Dinner
items.title_zh: “相当一个晚上” ：特朗普在白宫记者晚宴上拍摄后希望“节目继续”
items.summary: Shots were fired near the White House Correspondents' Dinner venue, prompting President Trump's temporary evacuation as a security precaution. The shooter was apprehended by law enforcement, who acted swiftly and bravely. Trump confirmed the incident and indicated plans to reschedule the event, emphasizing the safety of all attendees.

items.title: ‘Dhurandhar 2’ mints Rs 2.95 cr amid ‘Michael' and ‘Bhooth Bangla’ buzz
items.title_zh: 在“Michael”和“Bhooth Bangla”嗡嗡声中， “Dhurandhar 2”薄荷糖2.95卢比
items.summary: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' continues its strong box office run, nearing Rs 1,130 crore in India and Rs 1,780 crore worldwide after 38 days. Despite competition, the film saw significant growth on its 6th Saturday, earning Rs 2.95 crore domestically.  Meanwhile, 'Bhooth Bangla' and 'Michael' also performed on Saturday.

items.title: 'Dear cricket, give me one more chance': Karun Nair's old post resurfaces
items.title_zh: “亲爱的蟋蟀，再给我一次机会” ：卡伦·奈尔的旧帖子重新浮出水面
items.summary: Karun Nair endured a tough night as Delhi Capitals lost to Punjab Kings, who chased a record 265. Nair dropped Shreyas Iyer twice, allowing him to score 71 and seal the win. The moment went viral, with fans resurfacing Nair’s old “Dear cricket” post. Visibly shaken, the 34-year-old’s struggles highlighted both the cost of missed chances and his ongoing journey of resilience.

items.title: Starting January 1, Deloitte cuts parental leave, PTO, pension, IVF funding in US
items.title_zh: 从1月1日起，德勤削减美国的育儿假、带薪休假、养老金和试管婴儿资金
items.summary: Deloitte plans to reduce paid family leave from 16 to eight weeks and cut annual paid time off by 5-10 days for a segment of its US workforce starting January 1, 2027. These changes, affecting internal roles under the 'Center' talent model, aim to tailor benefits to market alignment. New pension plan contributions and adoption/surrogacy reimbursements will also cease.

items.title: Trump Evacuated As Shots Fired At White House Dinner, Shooter Arrested
items.title_zh: 特朗普在白宫晚宴上开枪时撤离，枪手被捕
items.summary: Several people in the crowd said they heard what sounded like five to eight gunshots.

items.title: White House Press Dinner Shooter "Very Sick", Was "Heavily Armed": Trump
items.title_zh: 白宫新闻晚宴射手“病得很重” ， “全副武装” ：特朗普
items.summary: US President Donald Trump addresses the press following the attack

items.title: "Let The Show Go On": Trump After Shooting During White House Press Dinner
items.title_zh: “让表演继续” ：特朗普在白宫新闻发布会期间拍摄后
items.summary: Trump also praised law enforcement and said the shooter had been apprehended after a shooting threat

items.title: Pinned On Ground: Trump Releases Photo Of White House Press Dinner Shooter
items.title_zh: 固定在地面上：特朗普发布白宫新闻晚宴射手的照片
items.summary: The Secret Service confirmed that one suspect was in custody

items.title: Trump Event Shooting Live Updates: Trump Says Press Dinner Shooter Was "Probably Alone"
items.title_zh: 特朗普活动拍摄现场更新：特朗普称记者晚宴射手“可能独自一人”
items.summary: Trump event shooting live updates: Donald Trump was evacuated after gunshots were heard at his event

items.title: Donald Trump, JD Vance Unhurt After Shots Fired During White House Event: What We Know So Far
items.title_zh: 唐纳德特朗普， JD万斯在白宫活动期间开枪后未受伤：到目前为止我们所知道的
items.summary: Trump, JD Vance Unhurt After Shots Fired During Press Dinner At White House

items.title: Video: Trump Ducks For Cover, Then Evacuated As Shots Heard At Press Dinner
items.title_zh: 视频：特朗普躲避掩护，然后在记者晚宴上听到枪声后撤离
items.summary: Trump attended the White House correspondents' dinner on Saturday night.

items.title: All Not Well In Uddhav Sena? MPs' 'Courtesy' Meetings Spark Exodus Buzz
items.title_zh: Uddhav Sena的一切都不顺利？ MPS “礼貌”会议引发Exodus Buzz
items.summary: A section of MPs is believed to be exploring other political options.

items.title: Gunmen Attack Several Locations Across Mali's Capital
items.title_zh: 枪手袭击马里首都多个地点
items.summary: Residents in other cities in central and northern Mali reported gunfire and blasts.

items.title: China Hints Its 4th Aircraft Carrier Will Be Nuclear-Powered
items.title_zh: 中国暗示其第四艘航空母舰将采用核动力
items.summary: China was the last among the major countries to opt for aircraft carriers.

items.title: トランプ氏出席の夕食会で発砲か「発砲者は確保」とSNSに投稿
items.title_zh: 在特朗普先生参加的晚宴上开枪，或在社交媒体上发帖称“射手安全”
items.summary: アメリカの首都・ワシントンで25日夜、日本時間の26日午前9時半ごろ、トランプ大統領が参加していたホワイトハウス記者会のイベントに武装した人物が乱入する騒ぎがありました。トランプ大統領は無事で、容疑者を拘束したとしています。

items.title: 岩手 大槌町の山林火災 約1373ヘクタールが焼ける
items.title_zh: 岩手县大土町（ Iwate Otsuchi-cho ）约有1,373公顷的森林火灾可供焚烧
items.summary: 岩手県大槌町の山林火災は発生から26日で5日目となり今も延焼が続いています。県と町によりますと、上空から焼けた範囲をおおまかに測った面積は26日朝の時点でおよそ1373ヘクタールと拡大していて、陸と空からの消火活動が行われています。

items.title: 北海道・三陸沖後発地震注意情報 引き続き日頃の備え確認を
items.title_zh: 中海道和味噌中学后领地之旅
items.summary: 今月20日に三陸沖で起きたマグニチュード7.7の大地震を受けて、気象庁は、千島海溝・日本海溝沿いでは、巨大地震が発生する可能性がふだんより高まっているとして「北海道・三陸沖後発地震注意情報」を発表しています。引き続き、日頃からの備えを確認するようにしてください。

items.title: ロシア下院議長 北朝鮮訪問 ロシア派兵記念館開館式出席へ
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯众议院议长将出席俄罗斯军事纪念博物馆开幕式。
items.summary: ロシア下院は25日、ボロジン下院議長が北朝鮮を訪問し、ロシアに派遣された北朝鮮軍の兵士たちをたたえる記念館の開館式に出席する予定だと発表しました。

items.title: 米特使ら派遣取りやめ トランプ大統領イラン側対応注視の姿勢
items.title_zh: 美国特使取消了特朗普的伊朗立场
items.summary: イランのアラグチ外相は仲介国のパキスタンでシャリフ首相らとの会談を終え、次の訪問先のオマーンに移動しました。アメリカのトランプ大統領は特使らのパキスタンへの派遣を取りやめ、イラン側の対応を注視していく姿勢を示しました。

items.title: ゼレンスキー大統領 アゼルバイジャンと防衛協力で一致
items.title_zh: 泽伦斯基总统与阿塞拜疆在国防合作方面团结一致
items.summary: ウクライナのゼレンスキー大統領は25日、アゼルバイジャンでアリエフ大統領と会談し、防衛分野などで協力を進めていくことで一致しました。

items.title: ホワイトソックス村上宗隆 5打数無安打 連続試合安打7で止まる
items.title_zh: White Sox Munetaka Murakami连续5场无安打比赛7次安打停止
items.summary: 大リーグ、アメリカンリーグのホームランランキングでトップに並んでいるホワイトソックスの村上宗隆選手は、25日、ナショナルズ戦に先発出場しましたがホームランは打てず5打数ノーヒットでした。

items.title: KAIST develops medical tool to identify multiple viruses simultaneously
items.title_zh: KAIST开发医疗工具来同时识别多种病毒
items.summary: Scientists at the Korea Advanced Institute of Science and Technology (KAIST), in collaboration with researchers at the University of California, Berkeley and the Gladstone Institutes, have developed a new technique that uses the gene-editing tool CRISPR to identify multiple pathogens at once, the institute said Friday. The technique, developed by KAIST professor Son Sung-min of the Department of Bio and Brain Engineering and an international team of researchers, relies on the reaction speed of an enzyme known as Cas13. By treating these variations as a “molecular barcode,” they can distinguish multiple viruses or bacteria in a single sample, potentially streamlining diagnostic testing for infectious diseases. Researchers found that the protein Cas13, which acts as a sensor for genetic material, displays a unique signature when it encounters a virus. Once the protein identifies its target, it triggers a chemical reaction that releases a fluorescent glow. The team discovered that the specific speed of this reaction changes depending on the pathogen involved, allowing scientists to us

items.title: Saudi Customs record 1,077 smuggling cases last week
items.title_zh: 沙特海关上周记录了1,077起走私案件
items.summary: RIYADH — The Zakat, Tax and Customs Authority (ZATCA) announced on Saturday that its land, sea, and air customs ports recorded 1,077 seizures of various types of contraband during the last week.The seized items include 37 types of narcotics, 475 types of prohibited substances, 2,103 types of tobacco and its derivatives, 21 cases involving cash, and 3 cases involving weapons and related equipment.ZATCA affirmed its commitment to strengthening customs control over the Kingdom's imports and exports to ensure the security and protection of society. This is part of ZATCA's ongoing efforts to enhance security and protect society from contraband, in continuous cooperation and coordination with all its partners in relevant agencies.The authority called on the public to contribute to combating smuggling to protect society and the national economy, by contacting it on the number dedicated to security reports 1910, or via email, or the international number 009661910. The authority said that it will handle reports related to smuggling crimes and violations of the provisions of the Unified Customs Law in complete confidentiality, with a financial reward given to the whistleblower if the reported information is correct.

items.title: Security forces arrest 1,454 infiltrators in a week
items.title_zh: 安全部队在一周内逮捕了1,454名渗透者
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi security authorities arrested a total of 12,192 illegal residents in a week. The arrests were made in the joint inspections, carried out by the security forces in collaboration with the relevant government agencies, during the period between April 16 and April 22, the Ministry of Interior revealed on Saturday.Those who were arrested include 6,606 violators of the Residency Law, 3,510 violators of the Border Security Law, and 2,076 violators of the Labor Law.The total number of people who were arrested while trying to cross the border into the Kingdom accounted for 1,454, of whom 32 percent were Yemeni nationals, 67 percent Ethiopian nationals, and one percent belonged to other nationalities. A total of 50 people were arrested while attempting to leave the Kingdom illegally.A total of 17,368 illegal residents were deported while 20,318 violators were referred to their diplomatic missions to obtain travel documents and 6,299 violators were referred to complete their travel reservations.Some 22 people involved in giving transportation, shelter, and employment for violators were also arrested. A total of 33,223 expatriates, including 30,666 men and 2,557 women, are currently undergoing procedures to enforce legal measures.The Ministry of Interior has warned that any person, who facilitates the illegal entry of individuals into the Kingdom, transports them on its territory, provides them with shelter or any other assistance or service, will be penalized with up to 15 years in prison and a fine of up to SR1 million, and that the vehicles used for transportation or houses used for giving shelter will be confiscated.The ministry urged the public to report any cases of violation by calling the number 911 in the regions of Makkah, Riyadh, and the Eastern Province and the numbers 999 and 996 in the rest of the Kingdom’s regions.

items.title: Myanmar national arrested for transporting 6 violators of Hajj regulations
items.title_zh: 缅甸国民因运送6名违反朝觐规定的人而被捕
items.summary: MAKKAH — The Hajj Security Forces arrested a Myanmar national for transporting six residents in violation of Hajj regulations and attempting to bring them into Makkah.The suspects were referred to the competent authority to face the prescribed penalties.The Ministry of Interior earlier warned that maximum fines of up to SR100,000 will be imposed on anyone transporting holders of any type of visit visa into Makkah and holy sites during the period from Dhul Qada 1 (April 19) to Dhul Hijjah 14 (May 31).A maximum fine of SR20,000 will be imposed on individuals caught performing or attempting to perform Hajj without a permit. The same penalty will be slapped on holders of all types of visit visas who enter or attempt to enter or stay in Makkah city and the holy sites during the period from April 19 to May 31.

items.title: Moroccan conjoined twins undergo medical evaluation after arrival in Riyadh
items.title_zh: 摩洛哥连体双胞胎抵达利雅得后接受医学评估
items.summary: RIYADH — Moroccan conjoined twins Saja and Duha arrived at King Khalid International Airport in Riyadh on Saturday. This is in implementation of the directives of Custodian of the Two Holy Mosques King Salman and Crown Prince and Prime MinisterMohammed bin Salman. The twins were transferred to King Abdullah Specialist Children’s Hospital in Riyadh to undergo medical evaluation in preparation for a possible separation surgery.

items.title: Saudi Vision 2030 enters final phase with 93% of KPIs meeting targets in 2025
items.title_zh: 沙特2030年愿景进入最后阶段，到2025年93%的关键绩效指标达到目标
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Vision 2030 entered its third and final phase from a position of stronger institutional maturity, broader economic diversification and sustained implementation momentum, according to the 2025 annual report released on Saturday.The report said 93% of Vision 2030 key performance indicators met or exceeded annual targets in 2025, while 90% of initiatives were completed or on track.A total of 935 initiatives were completed and 225 were progressing as planned out of 1,290 initiatives.All 309 Vision indicators also met or exceeded their interim targets. More than 2,200 reforms and measures were delivered across the first two phases.Saudi Arabia’s real GDP reached $1.31 trillion in 2025, while non-oil activities contributed 55% of GDP. Non-oil GDP grew 4.9% compared with 2024. The Kingdom also recorded its highest annual economic growth in three years at 4.5%.Private sector contribution to GDP reached 51%, up from 44% at the launch of the Vision, totaling $660.5 billion.Foreign direct investment inflows rose fivefold to $35.5 billion in 2025 compared with $7.5 billion in 2017.More than 700 international companies had established regional headquarters in Saudi Arabia, up from 44 in 2021.The Public Investment Fund’s assets increased nearly fivefold since the launch of the Vision to $909.7 billion from $192 billion.The fund has generated more than one million jobs locally since 2018, while estimated local content in PIF projects reached 60%.The number of SMEs increased from 429,000 in 2016 to more than 1.7 million in 2025. Women own 48% of commercial registrations, while female labor force participation rose from 22.8% to 35% by 2025. Saudi women also hold 43.9% of middle and senior management positions.Tourism continued to expand, with total visitors rising from 63 million to 123 million by the end of 2025, including domestic and international travelers.Total tourism spending reached a record $81.1 billion. More than 17 million visitors attended Riyadh Season 2025, while the Red Sea destination welcomed over 50,000 tourists across nine resorts.Religious tourism also advanced, with more than 18 million international Umrah pilgrims in 2025. The Makkah Route Initiative surpassed one million beneficiaries, while the Haramain High Speed Railway served 9.6 million passengers in 2025.Home ownership reached 66.24%, up from 47% in 2016. The number of Saudi families who became homeowners reached 851,387 by the end of 2025.Healthcare services covered 97.5% of population clusters, while life expectancy rose to 79.7 years, nearing the 2030 target of 80 years.In education, the number of Saudi students in the world’s top 200 universities doubled to 28,493. A total of 22 Saudi universities were ranked in the QS World University Rankings 2025, including King Fahd University of Petroleum and Minerals among the global top 100.The report also highlighted environmental progress. More than 151 million trees had been planted by the end of 2025, while renewable energy generation capacity increased to 46 GW from 3 GW in six years. Protected areas rose to 18.1% for terrestrial zones and 16.1% for marine areas.The annual report said Phase 3 of Vision 2030 will focus on accelerating delivery, maximizing impact and sustaining long-term progress while expanding private sector participation and international cooperation.

items.title: Crown Prince: Saudi ambition has been turned into real results under Vision 2030
items.title_zh: 王储：在2030年愿景下，沙特的雄心壮志已转化为实际成果
items.summary: RIYADH — Crown Prince and Prime Minister Mohammed bin Salman said Saudi Arabia has demonstrated how national ambition can be transformed into tangible achievements after a decade of progress under Saudi Vision 2030.In remarks published in the Vision 2030 Annual Report 2025 on Saturday, the Crown Prince said the Kingdom’s achievements were made possible through the determination of its people and the strength of its institutions.“After a decade of progress under Vision 2030, our nation has shown how ambition can be turned into real results,” he said.The Crown Prince added that the progress achieved in recent years requires building on current momentum, stepping up efforts and strengthening plans to sustain growth and continue improving the lives of citizens.The annual report said Saudi Arabia has entered the third and final phase of Vision 2030 from a position of stronger institutional maturity, broader economic diversification and sustained implementation momentum.According to the report, 93% of Vision 2030 key performance indicators met or exceeded annual targets in 2025, while 90% of initiatives were completed or on track. A total of 935 initiatives were completed and 225 were progressing as planned out of 1,290 initiatives.The report said real GDP reached $1.31 trillion in 2025, while non-oil activities contributed 55% of GDP. Non-oil GDP grew 4.9% compared with 2024, highlighting the continued expansion of diversification efforts.Tourism also remained a key growth driver, with the Kingdom recording 123 million tourists in 2025. Foreign direct investment inflows reached $35.5 billion, while more than 700 international companies established regional headquarters in Saudi Arabia.The report said Phase 3 of Vision 2030 will focus on accelerating delivery, maximizing impact and sustaining long-term progress.In 2016, Saudi Arabia launched Vision 2030 as a long-term national transformation strategy aimed at diversifying the economy, empowering citizens and reducing dependence on oil revenues.

items.title: King Salman: Saudi Arabia has become leading model for driving comprehensive development
items.title_zh: 萨勒曼国王：沙特阿拉伯已成为推动综合发展的领先典范
items.summary: RIYADH — Custodian of the Two Holy Mosques King Salman bin Abdulaziz said Saudi Arabia is continuing its journey toward a brighter future after a decade of major achievements under Saudi Vision 2030.In remarks published in the Vision 2030 Annual Report 2025 on Saturday, King Salman said the Kingdom has become a leading example of how to effectively harness its capabilities and resources to drive comprehensive development, with the results reflected in a better quality of life for citizens.“Our country continues its journey toward a brighter future, building on a decade of remarkable progress achieved under Vision 2030,” the King said.He added that the Kingdom has emerged as a model for using its strengths and resources to advance broad development goals.The annual report said Saudi Arabia has entered the third and final phase of Vision 2030 from a position of stronger institutional maturity, broader economic diversification and sustained implementation momentum.According to the report, 93% of Vision 2030 key performance indicators met or exceeded annual targets in 2025, while 90% of initiatives were completed or on track. A total of 935 initiatives were completed and 225 were progressing as planned out of 1,290 initiatives.The report said real GDP reached $1.31 trillion in 2025, while non-oil activities contributed 55% of GDP, underlining the growing strength of economic diversification efforts. Non-oil GDP grew 4.9% compared with 2024.Tourism remained one of the standout sectors, with the Kingdom recording 123 million tourists in 2025. Foreign direct investment inflows also reached $35.5 billion, while more than 700 global companies had established regional headquarters in Saudi Arabia.The report said Phase 3 of Vision 2030 will focus on accelerating delivery, maximizing impact and sustaining long-term progress, while expanding private sector participation and strengthening Saudi Arabia’s global partnerships. In 2016, Saudi Arabia launched Vision 2030 as a long-term national transformation strategy aimed at diversifying the economy, empowering citizens and reducing dependence on oil revenues.

items.title: Value of Saudi date exports surpasses SR1.9 billion in 2025, up 14.3%
items.title_zh: 2025年沙特枣出口额超过19亿里亚尔，增长14.3%
items.summary: RIYADH — Saudi Arabia achieved record growth in date exports in 2025, with their value reaching SR1.938 billion, a 14.3 percent increase compared to 2024 and a significant 59.5 percent surge since 2021.This milestone highlights the rising global demand for Saudi dates and the sector's enhanced production efficiency, directly supporting the objectives of Saudi Vision 2030 to diversify the national economy and increase the agricultural sector's contribution to the GDP.Minister of Environment, Water and Agriculture and Chairman of the Board of Directors of the National Center for Palms and Dates Abdulrahman Alfadley attributed this success to the leadership's support and effective public-private collaboration. He noted that the initiative to empower exports of Saudi dates has been instrumental in expanding market reach. Currently, the Kingdom exports unique varieties to over 125 countries, maintaining a competitive edge through high-quality standards and production volume exceeding 1.9 million tons from more than 37 million palm trees in 2025

items.title: Saudi Arabia condemns drone strikes on Kuwait launched from Iraq
items.title_zh: 沙特阿拉伯谴责从伊拉克对科威特发动的无人机袭击
items.summary: RIYADH — The Ministry of Foreign Affairs expressed Saudi Arabia’s condemnation and denunciation in the strongest terms of the targeting of two sites at the northern land border posts of Kuwait by drones launched from Iraq.Saudi Arabia emphasized its categorical rejection of any violation of the sovereignty of states and any attempt to threaten the security and stability of the region. It also reiterated the importance of the government of Iraq dealing responsibly with these threats to the Gulf states. The Kingdom expressed its solidarity with the government and people of Kuwait, and reaffirmed its full support for all measures taken by Kuwait to preserve its sovereignty, security, and stability.

items.title: Saudi Crown Prince, Zelensky discuss Ukraine crisis and Middle East in Jeddah talks
items.title_zh: 沙特王储泽伦斯基在吉达会谈中讨论乌克兰危机和中东问题
items.summary: Saudi Gazette JEDDAH — Saudi Crown Prince and Prime Minister Prince Mohammed bin Salman held talks with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy in Jeddah on Friday, focusing on regional and international developments, including the latest situation in the Middle East and the Ukraine crisis. During the meeting, the two leaders also reviewed bilateral relations between Saudi Arabia and Ukraine, areas of joint cooperation, and opportunities to further strengthen ties. Zelenskyy described the meeting as “highly productive,” saying in a post on X that Ukraine is working to finalize an agreement with Saudi Arabia covering security, energy, and food cooperation. The meeting was attended on the Saudi side by Defense Minister Prince Khalid bin Salman, Foreign Minister Prince Faisal bin Farhan, and Minister of State, Cabinet Member and National Security Adviser Dr. Musaed Al-Aiban. Representing Ukraine were Secretary of the National Security and Defense Council Rustem Umerov, Foreign Minister Andrii Sybiha, and Chief of the General Staff of the Armed Forces Andrii Hnatov.
